hooks.command: printf '[ai-maestro-webdesign] amw-design-principles is the orchestrator for design/UI tasks. Apply its 3 hard rules — (1) gather context (existing UI kit / brand tokens / references) before designing, (2) produce at least 3 variants, (3) check ai-slop-avoid.md before delivery — before invoking any sub-skill. Use /amw-sketch for fast ASCII variants, /amw-extract-style to capture an existing site, /amw-doctor to check env.\n'
